summary: FDA is proposing to exclude semaglutide, tirzepatide, and liraglutide from the 503B bulks list, finding no clinical need for outsourcing facilities to compound these drugs from bulk substances.

summary: FDA announces results from the largest and most rigorous examination ever conducted focused on chemical contaminants in infant formula available on the U.S. market.
